title: iPhone Charger Cable, 4Pack 6FT Lightning Cable [MFi Certified] Nylon Braided USB to Lightning iPhone Charger Fast Charging Cable for iPhone 14 13 12 11 Pro Max XS XR X 8 7 6 Plus 5 5s SE
features: 【Fast Charge & Sync iPhone Charger】This iphone cable fast charging built with upgarded C89 terminal (More durable) and smart MFi chip, wide-diameter wires and reduced cord resistance maximize charging speed. The New Upgraded iPhone charger cable supports fast charging (up to 3A) and data transfer (up to 480Mbps). The charging speed and data transfer is 3X as fast as the normal iPhone charger cable.

【Super Durable】This iphone fast charger cable is made of high-quality nylon braided sheath and aluminum shell, and the seamless laser-welded connector can withstand 15kg exterior force without breaking off. Each lightning cable has been tested with 30,000+ times bend lifespan and and 25,000+ times of plugging life, with strong bearing capacity. This iphone lightning cable is recognized by 6 million people and you can try with confidence.

【 Perfect Compatibility】This iPhone charger cable is MFi certified to ensure full compatibility and high-speed charging. The iPhone charger cable is fully compatible with iPhone 14/14 Pro/14 Pro Max/iPhone 13/13 Pro/13 Pro Max/12/12 Pro/12 Pro Max/11/11Pro/11Pro Max/XS/XS Max/XR/X/8/8 Plus/7/7 Plus/6s/6s Plus/6/6 Plus/5/5s/5c/SE and the latest iOS system.

【More Secure & Stable】This iPhone charger cable uses high-purity copper core, and built-in tinplate casing multiple shielding minimizes interference, ensure more stable charging current and no signal interference with data transmission. With overcharge protection, stable current protection, automatic switching, which has a positive effect on the battery life of the iPhone.

【 What You Get 】4Pack 6FT usb to lightning cable, the long iphone charger cable makes it convenient to charge your device in the bedroom, sofa, office, travel, even when you are in the back seat of the car. Any questions, please feel free to contact us.
